'''Huberdink Bufflin III''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] being and the [[Marriage/Legends|husband]] of [[Milli Bufflin]]. Both natives of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]], the couple were vacationing on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Amfar/Legends|Amfar]] during the growing [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. Due to the steep drop in tourism, the Bufflins found that they had many of the resorts facilities to themselves.
